team.name: MergePoint
team.tagline: A six-person team portfolio website built through feature branches, pull requests, code review, and final integration.

hero.title: Team Portfolio Website
hero.subtitle: A collaborative Git workshop project where students practice branching, pull requests, merges, and conflict resolution on a real frontend build.

goals: Create feature branches from the dev branch.
Resolve merge conflicts in shared files.
Merge dev into main after final integration.

workflow.title: Clone and Branch
workflow.description: Clone the repository, switch to dev, and create a feature branch for the assigned section.

workflow.title: Build Section
workflow.description: Implement the assigned navbar, hero, team, projects, footer, or contact area.

workflow.title: Open Pull Request
workflow.description: Push the branch to GitHub and create a pull request into dev for review.

workflow.title: Merge and Resolve
workflow.description: Merge approved work, resolve conflicts, then integrate dev into main.

members.name: Aysun
members.task: Create the navbar, logo, navigation links, mobile menu, and footer.

members.name: Rashad
members.task: Create the hero section with title, subtitle, and button.

members.name: Umid
members.task: Create the about team section with team description, team goals, images, and content.

members.name: Imameli
members.task: Create team member cards with name, role, and image.

members.name: Javidan
members.task: Create the projects section with project cards, descriptions, and links.

members.name: Nasir
members.task: Create the contact section and add social/contact links.

projects.title: Navbar + Footer
projects.description: A responsive navbar with logo, navigation links, mobile menu, and a footer for workshop links and branding.

projects.title: Hero Section
projects.description: A first-screen section with title, subtitle, and button that introduces the team portfolio project.

projects.title: About Team
projects.description: A section with team description, collaboration goals, and supporting images or content.

projects.title: Team Members
projects.description: Team member cards with each contributor's name, role, image, and feature branch responsibility.

projects.title: Projects Section
projects.description: Project cards with descriptions and links that show the portfolio work delivered by the team.

projects.title: Contact Section
projects.description: A contact area with a form plus social and contact links for reaching the team.
